channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10202] replay-ost-single: short description of the failure
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@intel.com>

Please provide additional information about the failure here.

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/38bd289a-c07a-11e7-8cd9-52540065bddc.

Started lustre-OST0000
CMD: trevis-11vm10,trevis-11vm9.trevis.hpdd.intel.com PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/qt-3.3/bin:/usr/lib64/compat-openmpi16/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config sh rpc.sh wait_import_state_mount FULL osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-*.ost_server_uuid 
trevis-11vm10: h2tcp: deprecated, use h2nettype instead
trevis-11vm9: h2tcp: deprecated, use h2nettype instead
trevis-11vm10: trevis-11vm10.trevis.hpdd.intel.com: executing wait_import_state_mount FULL osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-*.ost_server_uuid
trevis-11vm9: trevis-11vm9.trevis.hpdd.intel.com: executing wait_import_state_mount FULL osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-*.ost_server_uuid
trevis-11vm9: CMD: trevis-11vm9.trevis.hpdd.intel.com lctl get_param -n at_max
trevis-11vm10: CMD: trevis-11vm10.trevis.hpdd.intel.com lctl get_param -n at_max
trevis-11vm9: osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-*.ost_server_uuid in FULL state after 2 sec
trevis-11vm10: osc.lustre-OST0000-osc-*.ost_server_uuid in FULL state after 2 sec
CMD: trevis-11vm9.trevis.hpdd.intel.com lctl get_param -n at_max
affected facets: ost1
CMD: trevis-11vm11 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/qt-3.3/bin:/usr/lib64/compat-openmpi16/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/bin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config sh rpc.sh _wait_recovery_complete *.lustre-OST0000.recovery_status 1475 
trevis-11vm11: h2tcp: deprecated, use h2nettype instead
trevis-11vm11: trevis-11vm11.trevis.hpdd.intel.com: executing _wait_recovery_complete *.lustre-OST0000.recovery_status 1475
trevis-11vm11: *.lustre-OST0000.recovery_status status: COMPLETE
Can't lstat /mnt/lustre/d0.replay-ost-single/f6.replay-ost-single: No such file or directory
Waiting for orphan cleanup...
CMD: trevis-11vm12 /usr/sbin/lctl list_param osp.*osc*.old_sync_processed 2> /dev/null
osp.lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0000.old_sync_processed
osp.lustre-OST0001-osc-MDT0000.old_sync_processed
wait 40 secs maximumly for trevis-11vm12 mds-ost sync done.
CMD: trevis-11vm12 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osp.*osc*.old_sync_processed
sleep 5 for ZFS OSD
Waiting for local destroys to complete
before: 15995904 after: 15994880
 replay-ost-single test_6: @@@@@@ FAIL: 15995904 > 15994880 + logsize 512
item.summary: replay-ost-single: short description of the failure

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
